content:
# Best AI Productivity Tools for Remote Teams in 2026

Remote teams face unique challenges in communication and collaboration. AI tools help bridge the gap!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]]: Team Knowledge Hub

[[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] helps remote teams organize knowledge, collaborate on documents, and stay aligned.

### Notion AI for Remote Teams
- **Shared workspace**: All team knowledge in one place
- **AI summaries**: Quick recaps of long documents
- **Task management**: Keep everyone on the same page

---

## [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]: Project Management

[[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] adds AI features to project management for remote teams.

### ClickUp AI for Remote Work
- **AI task creation**: Turn discussions into actionable tasks
- **Automated workflows**: Reduce manual work
- **Team insights**: Track productivity without micromanaging

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] | Knowledge management | $8/mo |
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project management | $7/mo |
| [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]] | Task management | $4/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Knowledge hub**: Start with [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]]
- **Project tracking**: Use [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]
- **Simple tasks**: Try [[link:/tools/53|Todoist AI]]

Ready to boost remote team productivity? Try these AI tools today!
